props.name: backdrop
props.description: Apply a backdrop on body while offcanvas is open.

props.name: className
props.description: A string of all className you want applied to the base component.

props.name: keyboard
props.description: Closes the offcanvas when escape key is pressed.

props.name: onHide
props.description: Callback fired when the component requests to be hidden.

props.name: onShow
props.description: Callback fired when the component requests to be shown.

props.name: placement
props.description: Components placement, there’s no default placement.

props.name: responsive
props.description: Responsive offcanvas property hide content outside the viewport from a specified breakpoint and down.

props.name: scroll
props.description: Allow body scrolling while offcanvas is open

props.name: visible
props.description: Toggle the visibility of offcanvas component.
